Persona 5 Royal Keychains Finally Get to US and Canada Gashapon Machines

It took a while, but the Persona 5 Royal rubber mascot character keychains are in Gashapon machines in the US and Canada.

The post Persona 5 Royal Keychains Finally Get to US and Canada Gashapon Machines appeared first on Siliconera.

text:
New The Ghost in the Shell Anime Trailer Teases July Debut

There's a trailer for the new The Ghost in the Shell anime that includes its release date and highlights it ahead of the Annecy debut.

The post New The Ghost in the Shell Anime Trailer Teases July Debut appeared first on Siliconera.

text:
Animate Will Sell Sega Games Merchandise Worldwide in 2026

Animate will sell merchandise based on and offer demos of Sega and Atlus games throughout 2026 worldwide.

The post Animate Will Sell Sega Games Merchandise Worldwide in 2026 appeared first on Siliconera.

Sega GaaS, Online Super Game Canceled

Sega announced its planned Super Game online, games as a service title is now canceled, following it being in development since 2022.
